summary: Tested RoutineQuest full stack: JWT auth, login/logout, Gabriela/Rafael accounts, new user signup, API data sync. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend login/logout/signup flows work. One design/data bug found with displayName for new users.

ui_bugs.issue: New user profile name defaults to 'User' instead of their actual displayName. main.jsx passes `defaultTheme={currentUser.theme}` but theme object has no `displayName` key. Fix: pass `{...currentUser.theme, displayName: currentUser.displayName}` as defaultTheme.

action_items: Fix displayName in StoreProvider: in main.jsx change defaultTheme={currentUser.theme} to defaultTheme={{...currentUser.theme, displayName: currentUser.displayName}} so new users see their real name instead of 'User'
critical_code_review_comments: main.jsx line 13: `defaultTheme={currentUser.theme}` drops displayName — non-rafael new users get profile.name = 'User' on first login since theme object has no displayName property
useStore.js: 1032 lines — approaching the 700-line limit, consider splitting gamification/seed data into separate modules
server.py: bcrypt operations are synchronous but FastAPI is async-capable — acceptable for small load but worth noting
seed_data_creation: PUT /api/data test overwrote rafael's cloud data with minimal payload {habits:[], profile:{name:'Rafael', totalXP:100}}. Rafael's localStorage seed data will be re-applied on next fresh browser load.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All auth flows tested and working. Rafael (admin), Gabriela (gabriela) logins verified. Logout returns to user-tile screen. New user signup works via API. Key issue: new user profile shows 'User' not their real name due to missing displayName in defaultTheme prop.
